today.name: Today
today.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 85. Southwest wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

tonight.name: Tonight
tonight.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 71. Southeast wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

tomorrow.name: Sunday
tomorrow.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 93. Heat index values as high as 109. South wind 1 to 7 mph.

weather.whatToWear: Light breathable layers today — 53% storm chance, so a packable rain shell for any afternoon outing. Tomorrow's a different beast: high of 93 with heat index to 109 — sunscreen, hat, and water if you're outside past noon.

life.oneThing: Roll through Soulard Farmers Market this morning before the storms roll in this afternoon — it's the one STL Saturday ritual that actually rewards the early alarm.

rec.title: The Daily (podcast, today)
rec.blurb: Today's episode covers the SCOTUS term wrap and a long read on AI datacenter power deals — perfect Saturday-morning coffee listen, ~25 min.

driveDistanceIdeas.name: Johnson Shut-Ins State Park
driveDistanceIdeas.blurb: Natural waterpark carved by volcanic rock — peak summer move, swim the shut-ins before noon to beat the crowds.

driveDistanceIdeas.name: Meramec River float (Steelville)
driveDistanceIdeas.blurb: Float the Meramec — float-fest outfitters handle the rentals. Best with the afternoon storms we've been having.

driveDistanceIdeas.name: Cahokia Mounds at sunset
driveDistanceIdeas.blurb: UNESCO site — Monks Mound catches evening light. Quick half-day, fits a Saturday.

retirement.planningNote: Quiet reminder: Q3 estimated-tax payment is due September 15. Nothing to do this weekend — just making sure it's on the radar before mid-summer travel eats the calendar.
